---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect data, broken exports, or repo issues
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What is wrong?

Describe the bug or incorrect dataset behavior clearly.

## Affected ticker(s) or file(s)

List the ticker symbols, exchanges, or exported files involved.

## Expected result

Describe what the correct result should be.

## Evidence

Add links or source material that support the correction.

## Reproduction

If relevant, include the command, query, or file path used to observe the problem.
